meaning: adj.不动人的,不庄严的,没有威信的
examples: On the whole the results of this system are unimposing.
I do not like the lion, they compare the tiger clown, is also unimposing.
In real life, the transcendent man is an unimposing figure who could pass for Woody Allen's even nerdier younger brother.
On the surface Vasella is unimposing and soft-voiced, a gentleman from head to toe.
The only real marker is a strangely unimposing obelisk, like a highway marker for some forlorn, forgotten incident.
